creator: CQG00620@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 163508
A patch for japanese/today

1) Change MASTER_SITES and remove the BROKEN flag (distfile unfetchable).

2) Add endianness detection code.  All the other architectures except i386
   (ex. amd64) were considered big-endian.

3) Bump PORTREVISION.

4) Take maintainership.
